race.comment: CENTRAL PARK (6) got a well-deserved victory around this circuit at the latest effort and winning rider Sandkuhl stays on top. Again gets the benefit of her 2kg claim and should be right there at the business end again. CANBERRA LEGEND (8) has been plying his trade in harder metro company and will appreciate the sharp drop back in grade here. Watch for a spike in form. JOURNALISM (4) has a solid record over this mile journey with a win and six placings from nine attempts. Has to be included. KUREDER (2) is a stayer resuming who should be hitting the line with gusto. HYDE PARK (10) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be underestimated.
